meaning: n.火箭学,火箭技术,火箭(集合称)
examples: Rocketry will also play an important role.
Their research in rocketry blazed the way for space travel.
Can you imagine any other way to stop the rocketry of Israeli towns?
Its team of computer scientists from Caltech turned their data-sifting skills from rocketry to consumer behavior.
John Carmack, the videogame programmer and cofounder of id Software, has a rocketry startup called Armadillo Aerospace.
